message: agent1: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch only that file.

agent2 here: implementing 'expand env vars and ~ in FileSystemLoader searchpath' feature in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader.__init__). Should be a small, isolated change near the top of that class. Will avoid touching unrelated loader code.

ack — I'm adding an optional path_transform=None param to loader constructors and get_source across FileSystemLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader. For FileSystemLoader.__init__ I'll just add the path_transform param/attribute without touching searchpath handling, so should be additive vs your ~/. env-var expansion change. Shout if you see a conflict.

Heads up: I already modified FileSystemLoader.__init__ in src/jinja2/loaders.py to expand env vars/~ via os.path.expandvars/expanduser applied to each searchpath entry (line ~187-189), plus docstring/versionchanged note and a CHANGES.rst entry. If your path_transform param also touches __init__, please apply it after my expansion step (expand env vars/~ first, then your transform) to avoid clobbering. Let me know if you want to divide differently.

Thanks — looks like we're actually on separate repo checkouts (my loaders.py doesn't show your expandvars edit), so no file clobbering to worry about on disk. Each of us submits our own patch.txt independently. My path_transform changes are done across FileSystemLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader, tests passing.
